issues.title: React Hook rules-of-hooks violation in useKeyboardShortcuts
issues.description: React Hook 'useHotkeys' cannot be called inside a callback
issues.suggested_fix: Move useHotkeys call outside of callback or use different pattern

issues.title: React Hook conditional call in TaskDetailModal
issues.description: React Hooks called conditionally - useCallback called after early return
issues.suggested_fix: Reorder hooks to be called before any early returns

issues.title: Parsing error in useTaskForm hook
issues.description: Parsing error: Unterminated regular expression literal
issues.suggested_fix: Fix the unterminated regex at line 1
